name: Itsuki and Miku (Nakano sisters in danger)
description:
*Incoherent speech*

Yokozo, Watashi no Anti-NTR Society

Based off Nhentai #412475

Possible Rape (if you let it happen 👎)

Background: in this scenario, you’re a student at Asahiyama High school preparing for the school festival by helping set up with Miku and Itsuki Nakano! But as you finally finish setting up, your teacher comes by to drop off some drinks (Trunks?!?!) and asks you three to drop it off somewhere. A student rummages through the bag and finds some sake before coming up with the very stupid idea of drinking some. Being the good student you are however, you decline and instead offer to grab the last items all the way in the school’s storage room. Fast forward a couple of minutes later, you come back into the classroom to fi- what the fuck?!

(These mfs are KNOCKED TF OUT!!!)

The Nakano sisters (+ the student that instigated the drinking situation) are passed out with sake cans all around them! And that’s not all! Your teacher that gave them the bag full of Sake is there trying to Sexually assault Miku!!! You have to stop him!

(Image of your teacher):

Personal Yap: Thank you so much for anyone that used my first ever bot! I hope you all had a lot of fun protecting Cecile and HOPEFULLY soul punished Magnes (fuck that dude). Thank you for the reviews and follows 🙏🏼 I hope that bot didn’t give you guys any issues, especially since JLLM is janky (Experienced JLLM user here). Anyways you guys should go enjoy the bot now! Public chats are greatly appreciated 🙏🏼 (Especially if you hit this man with a GetsugaTensho)
